name: Plane Wars
author: Poki
description: Plane Wars is an action-packed aerial shooter where you take control of a fighter plane and blast your way to the top! Aim, shoot down enemy aircraft, and earn money with every victory. Use your rewards to unlock awesome new planes and upgrades. Ready to rule the skies? How to play Plane Wars? Click or tap to lock the camera. Who created Plane Wars? Plane Wars is created by INTCH. Play their other games on Poki: Mall Tycoon ! How can I play Plane Wars for free? You can play Plane Wars for free on Poki. Can I play Plane Wars on mobile devices and desktop? Plane Wars can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
